title: NPA drops Mhlana probe
description: PLETTENBERG BAY NEWS - The Hawks have...
bodyText: [{"type":"paragraph","text":"PLETTENBERG BAY NEWS - The Hawks have dropped their investigation into allegations of fraud, tender rigging and interfering with the tender process against Bitou Councillor Thembela Mhlana.","html":"PLETTENBERG BAY NEWS - The Hawks have dropped their investigation into allegations of fraud, tender rigging and interfering with the tender process against Bitou Councillor Thembela Mhlana."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"The charges were laid by a former business associate of Mhlana in 2023, relating to work done on a project to install fibre cabling along the N2 after Mhlana was elected as an ANC ward councillor."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Mhlana was elected as a Bitou municipal councillor in November 2021 and resigned as a director of the company allegedly involved. The investigation found that Mhlana was no longer director of the company when it was awarded the tender in May 2023.","html":"Mhlana was elected as a Bitou municipal councillor in November 2021 and resigned as a director of the company allegedly involved. The investigation found that Mhlana was no longer director of the company when it was awarded the tender in May 2023."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Over the moon","html":"Over the moon"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Hawks spokesperson Lieutenant Colonel Siyabulela Vukubi confirmed that, after investigation, the matter was referred to the National Prosecuting Authority (NPA), who declined to prosecute.","html":"Hawks spokesperson Lieutenant Colonel Siyabulela Vukubi confirmed that, after investigation, the matter was referred to the National Prosecuting Authority (NPA), who declined to prosecute."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"No proof of tender fraud was found as alleged by the complainant and there were no prospects of successful prosecution."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"\"I am over the moon,\" Mhlana said, \"because this was humiliating for me … politics is about persuasion\".","html":"\"I am over the moon,\" Mhlana said, \"because this was humiliating for me … politics is about persuasion\"."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"}]
